chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-885 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 26.12.2022 Mr. Agha Waqar Ahmed advocate for petitioners. Mr. Ayaz Ali Rajpar, Assistant A.G. Sindh and Ms. Sana Memon, Assistant Prosecutor General along with ASI Muhammad Saleh Pinjoro on behalf of SHO Khipro. ----- Learned AAG has filed comments, according to which, protection will be provided as ordered earlier. Petition stands disposed of. JUDGE Ali Haider
